title: Xi Jinping urges China's armed forces to focus on prepping for wars
description: "It is imperative to conscientiously summarize and apply successful experience in reforms, to master new situations and understand the requirements of the tasks...
snippet:
BEIJING, September 21. /TASS/. Chinese President Xi Jinping has urged China's military to focus attention on gearing up for military action.
